caption: A person's hand is positioned in the foreground of a scene, moving from an open-palm gesture toward a closed fist. In the background, a man wearing a black shirt is seated at a table featuring a black and orange mat with the "JASPYS" logo and "CASEBREAK" branding. To the man's left, a red baseball sits on the mat. A vertical screen overlay on the right side of the frames displays a live chat feed with messages from users "givedog07" and "NightOwl." One message from "NightOwl" reads, "CSA the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/3zezeXf9". As the sequence progresses, the hand in the foreground closes, and the man in the background remains relatively still, looking toward the camera.
